title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: fuzzy matching
steps.summary: fuzzy matching belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Tree-Based Models. Start after Fuzzy Systems and Matching Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Demographic parity
steps.summary: Demographic parity belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with fuzzy matching and Quality Diversity (QD). It opens into Fairness Metrics (e.g., Demographic Parity, Equal Opportunity) and Demographic Parity Constraints in Trees.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Quality Diversity (QD)
steps.summary: Quality Diversity (QD) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with fuzzy matching and Demographic parity.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
